source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u－t图象如图8中乙所示。则以下说法中正确的是(　　)

choice_map.B: 当闭合开关S时，三只灯泡均能正常发光
choice_map.C: 当闭合开关S时，电流表的示数为1.5 A
choice_map.D: 当断开开关S时，变压器的输出功率变小

extraction_notes: 答案字段为多选字母"BCD"，已按题干内嵌选项映射为对应选项文本

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says '如图甲所示' and references 'u-t图象如图8中乙所示', so the circuit configuration and waveform graph are required inputs
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem is not intended to be solvable from text alone
asset_registry_record shows an image exists and registry_passed=true; metadata readability_score=0.9499 suggests the visual source is usable
multi_step: the problem asks which options are correct among four statements, requiring evaluation of multiple claims rather than a single direct lookup
question_text includes transformer turns ratio, bulb ratings, switch states, and an AC u-t graph, implying combined electrical reasoning across several conditions
answer_text='BCD' suggests at least three option judgments are involved, likely requiring chained calculations or comparisons (voltage, current, and power/state changes)
verifiability: choices are explicitly enumerated as A-D and answer_text='BCD' gives a clear target set of correct options
the statements contain concrete physical claims (meter reading, bulb normal operation, current value, output power change) that are in principle checkable from the given data
answer_present=true, answer_type='short_text', and registry_passed=true support straightforward answer-key verification

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案与题目所需图片均存在，且 asset registry 无 issues、registry_passed=true
初步评分较高：image_dependency_score=0.97、multi_step_score=0.74、verifiability_score=0.93，具备较强入池价值
虽有 image_required 与多选答案短文本编码风险，但当前关键语义载体已齐备，不构成降级或拒绝理由

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。

field_audit_records.after_value: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。则以下说法中正确的是（ ）

rewrite_reports.rationale: The correct answer consists of three separate correct statements (B, C, and D), so the multiple-choice item is rewritten into three directly answerable open-ended subquestions anchored to those propositions.

variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 1
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当闭合开关S时，三只灯泡的发光情况如何？
variants.expected_answer: 三只灯泡均能正常发光

variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 2
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当闭合开关S时，电流表的示数是多少？

variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 3
variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当断开开关S时，变压器的输出功率如何变化？

open_ended_problem_variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 1
open_ended_problem_variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当闭合开关S时，三只灯泡的发光情况如何？
open_ended_problem_variants.expected_answer: 三只灯泡均能正常发光

open_ended_problem_variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 2
open_ended_problem_variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当闭合开关S时，电流表的示数是多少？

open_ended_problem_variants.title: Multi-Physics 开放题 3
open_ended_problem_variants.rewritten_question_text: 如图甲所示，变压器原、副线圈的匝数比为55∶9，L1、L2、L3为三只规格均为“36 V，18 W”的相同灯泡，各电表均为理想交流电表，输入端交变电压的u-t图象如图8中乙所示。当断开开关S时，变压器的输出功率如何变化？
